verbatim: Absolutely love the loyalty rewards program! The points system is easy to understand.
Good coffee but the app crashes sometimes when redeeming points.
Best coffee subscription I've ever had. Always fresh and the import timing is perfect.
Packaging arrived damaged twice this month. Needs improvement.
Really enjoying the new seasonal blends. Wish the points expired less quickly.
The barista tips in the newsletter are a wonderful touch. Feels like a real community.
Waited 3 weeks for delivery. No communication about the delay.
Switched from a competitor and I'm not looking back. Fantastic quality.
Coffee is decent but nothing special.
